title: aspidium alpinum
intro: Aspidium alpinum, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium alpinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism and arthritis, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
